caption: A video displays a split-screen presentation featuring a spreadsheet on the left and a promotional sidebar on the right. The spreadsheet contains names and regions, including "BRIAN FRANK" paired with "ATLANTIC," "BRIAN FRANK*" with "CENTRAL," "Kennard Bolt" with "NORTHWEST," "BRIAN FRANK" with "PACIFIC," "Kyle Barber" with "SOUTHEAST," and "BRIAN FRANK" with "SOUTHWEST." The sidebar features a logo for "JASPYS CASEBREAKS.COM" and a small video inset of a man with a beard wearing a dark shirt. Below the inset, text prompts viewers to "Hit the SUBSCRIBE button down below!" next to a red YouTube Subscribe button. Across the bottom of the screen, a red banner displays "WWW.JASPYSCASEBREAKS.COM" in white lettering. The visual content remains static across the frames, with no movement, changes in clothing, or shifts in the on-screen text and layout.
